languages.text: "Нас всех стоило бы заключить под стражу и судить за подобное преступление против почтенной реликвии..." {n}Соломон застывает, ни одним новым движением не допуская дальнейшей порчи Патента.{/n}
"We should all be taken into custody and tried for such a crime against this sacred relic..." {n}Solomorne is completely still, not permitting any new movement to further damage the Warrant.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Нас всех стоило бы заключить под стражу и судить за подобное преступление против почтенной реликвии..." {n}Соломон застывает, ни одним новым движением не допуская дальнейшей порчи Патента.{/n}

"We should all be taken into custody and tried for such a crime against this sacred relic..." {n}Solomorne is completely still, not permitting any new movement to further damage the Warrant.{/n}

languages.text: 「この聖なる遺物に対するこのような犯罪に対して、我々は全員拘束され、裁判を受けるべきだ…」{n}ソロモーンは完全に静まり、新たな動きによって証書がさらに損傷されるのを許さない。{/n}
languages.original_text: "We should all be taken into custody and tried for such a crime against this sacred relic..." {n}Solomorne is completely still, not permitting any new movement to further damage the Warrant.{/n}

traits.locale_text: 「この聖なる遺物に対するこのような犯罪に対して、我々は全員拘束され、裁判を受けるべきだ…」{n}ソロモーンは完全に静まり、新たな動きによって証書がさらに損傷されるのを許さない。{/n}

languages.text: «Deberían arrestarnos a todos y juzgarnos por semejante crimen contra una reliquia sagrada...». {n}Solomorne permanece inmóvil para evitar dañar más la Patente con sus movimientos.{/n}
languages.original_text: "We should all be taken into custody and tried for such a crime against this sacred relic..." {n}Solomorne is completely still, not permitting any new movement to further damage the Warrant.{/n}

traits.locale_text: «Deberían arrestarnos a todos y juzgarnos por semejante crimen contra una reliquia sagrada...». {n}Solomorne permanece inmóvil para evitar dañar más la Patente con sus movimientos.{/n}

languages.text: "Wir sollten alle für ein derartiges Verbrechen an diesem heiligen Relikt vor Gericht gestellt werden ..." {n}Solomorne regt sich nicht, als wolle er den Handelsbrief nicht noch mehr beschädigen.{/n}
languages.original_text: "We should all be taken into custody and tried for such a crime against this sacred relic..." {n}Solomorne is completely still, not permitting any new movement to further damage the Warrant.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Wir sollten alle für ein derartiges Verbrechen an diesem heiligen Relikt vor Gericht gestellt werden ..." {n}Solomorne regt sich nicht, als wolle er den Handelsbrief nicht noch mehr beschädigen.{/n}

languages.text: « Nous méritons d'être arrêtés et jugés pour notre crime à l'encontre de cette relique sacrée... » {n}Solomorne se tient immobile, veillant à ne pas effectuer le moindre geste susceptible d'endommager davantage la lettre.{/n}
languages.original_text: "We should all be taken into custody and tried for such a crime against this sacred relic..." {n}Solomorne is completely still, not permitting any new movement to further damage the Warrant.{/n}

traits.locale_text: « Nous méritons d'être arrêtés et jugés pour notre crime à l'encontre de cette relique sacrée... » {n}Solomorne se tient immobile, veillant à ne pas effectuer le moindre geste susceptible d'endommager davantage la lettre.{/n}

languages.text: “我们都该被抓起来，并因对这件圣物犯下的罪行而接受审判……”{n}索罗蒙一动不动，生怕任何举动都会进一步损坏贸易授状。{/n}
languages.original_text: "We should all be taken into custody and tried for such a crime against this sacred relic..." {n}Solomorne is completely still, not permitting any new movement to further damage the Warrant.{/n}

traits.locale_text: “我们都该被抓起来，并因对这件圣物犯下的罪行而接受审判……”{n}索罗蒙一动不动，生怕任何举动都会进一步损坏贸易授状。{/n}

languages.text: "Bu kutsal yadigâra karşı işlenen böylesi bir suç yüzünden hepimiz gözaltına alınmalı ve yargılanmalıyız..." {n}Hareketsiz bekleyen Solomorne, Ruhsatname'ye daha fazla zarar verecek en ufak hareketten kaçınıyor.{/n}
